notes: COMPLETED. Literature review with 25 papers surveyed. POC requirements approved by human researcher (2026-04-02): Dual benchmarks (ToolBench + GAIA), 50 trajectories POC, Claude-3.5-Sonnet (Bedrock) + GPT-OSS 120B judges, pre-requisite verification system, CCG metric, timeline 2-3 weeks, budget $30-80 (scales to $80-200). All deliverables committed to repo. Next: Task 02 - Implementation of experimental infrastructure.
